title: Youtube poop: Mario's Good Christmas Gift The Ending
description:
the ending finally the quality was lowered by youtube but oh well its done the last part to this poop it took a while to come up with some of the jokes I needed some help at the you(chew)poop forums. I would like to thank Tabull89 for giveing me mario, link, and luigi's heads and I would like to thank everyone else at the character heads thread for helping ^_^
